title: I was paying for 3 AI subscriptions just to compare answers — so I built a chatroom where they all reply at once, on your own API keys. Roast it.
summary: Hey r/SideProject 👋 I am a solo creator (well, who is not these days?). I kept paying for ChatGPT Plus + Claude Pro + Gemini mostly to compare answers across tabs — ~$60/mo for tools I each used part-time. So I built ByteChat ( https://bytechat.io): one chatroom where you add your own API keys and every model answers together. Ask once, compare side by side, "@mention" one to go deeper, or chain them (draft → refine). The BYOK part is the point: you pay each provider's raw token rate — usually
